common.validationErrorsDescription: Please fix the errors before continuing.
common.limitReachedDescription: Limit of 3 stores per user reached. You must delete an existing store before creating a new one.
common.slugTaken: This store name is already in use
common.slugTakenChooseOther: This store name is already taken. Please choose another one.
common.slugReserved: The name "{{slug}}" is reserved and cannot be used as a store subdomain

basicInfo.storeNameHint: The public name of your store (required)
basicInfo.slugHint: Used in your store URL: emarzona.com/{{slug}}
basicInfo.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your store
basicInfo.aboutPlaceholder: Tell your store's story, values, and mission...
basicInfo.currencyHint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code (e.g. XOF, EUR, USD)
basicInfo.commerceTypeLocked: Store type is locked because {{count}} product(s) already published. Create a new store to change vertical.
basicInfo.commerceTypeEditHint: Type cannot be changed after the first product is published.
basicInfo.commerceTypeCreateHint: Subscription is only required for Physical Products store type.
basicInfo.storeAccessibleAt: Your store will be accessible at:
basicInfo.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your store in a few words...
basicInfo.descriptionHint: This description will appear on your store page
basicInfo.aboutTabHint: Detailed text that will appear in the "About" tab of your store
basicInfo.currencyDefaultHint: This currency will be used by default for your new products

infoMessage.label: Info message (optional)
infoMessage.placeholder: E.g.: 🎉 Special promotion: -20% on all products until January 31!
infoMessage.placeholderShort: E.g.: 🎉 Special promotion: -20% on all products!
infoMessage.hint: Message displayed at the top of your store (promotions, alerts, announcements, etc.)
infoMessage.hintShort: Message displayed at the top of your store
infoMessage.fontHint: Font used to display the message
infoMessage.previewHint: Preview of how the message will look on your store

branding.imagesDescription: Customize your store appearance with a professional logo and banner
branding.logoDescription: Recommended format: 500×500 (1:1 ratio) for logos. The logo will appear on your store page.
branding.bannerDescription: Recommended format: 1920×600 (16:5 ratio) for banners. The banner will appear at the top of your store page.
branding.faviconDescription: Recommended format: 32×32 or 64×64 pixels. Icon displayed in the browser tab.
branding.appleTouchDescription: Recommended format: 180×180 pixels. Icon used on iOS when the store is added to the home screen.
branding.watermarkDescription: Recommended format: Transparent image. Watermark applied to product images (optional).
branding.placeholderDescription: Recommended format: 800×800 pixels. Image used when a product image is unavailable.

contact.heading: Primary contact
contact.sectionDescription: Make it easy for customers to reach you
contact.emailHint: This email will be displayed on your store page for contact requests
contact.phoneHint: Phone number to contact your store
contact.extraDescription: Add dedicated contacts for different services

social.title: Social media
social.description: Link your social media to strengthen your online presence

seo.title: SEO configuration
seo.description: Optimize your store's search engine ranking
seo.metaTitleHint: This title will appear in Google search results
seo.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe your store in 2-3 sentences. Include relevant keywords.
seo.metaDescriptionHint: This description will appear below the title in search results
seo.metaKeywordsHint: Separate keywords with commas. Example: "store, e-commerce, digital products"
seo.ogTitlePlaceholder: Title displayed when sharing on Facebook, Twitter, etc.
seo.ogTitleHint: If empty, the SEO title will be used
seo.ogDescriptionPlaceholder: Description displayed when sharing on social media
seo.ogDescriptionHint: If empty, the SEO description will be used
seo.ogImageHint: URL of the image displayed when sharing. Recommended format: 1200×630px

location.title: Location and hours
location.description: Configure your store's full address and opening hours
location.specialHoursHint: Set special hours for holidays, events, or exceptional periods

toast.incompleteAddressDescription: Please fill in at least address line 1 and a city to geocode.

legal.title: Legal pages and content
legal.description: Configure legal pages and informational content for your store
legal.markdownHint: You can use Markdown formatting to structure your content

terms_of_service.label: Terms and conditions
terms_of_service.description: Define your store's terms and conditions of sale
terms_of_service.placeholder: Enter your terms and conditions of sale...

privacy_policy.label: Privacy policy
privacy_policy.description: Explain how you collect and use personal data

return_policy.label: Return policy
return_policy.description: Define your return and exchange policy

shipping_policy.label: Shipping policy
shipping_policy.description: Explain your shipping methods and delivery times

cookie_policy.label: Cookie policy
cookie_policy.description: Explain cookie usage on your site

disclaimer.label: Legal disclaimer
disclaimer.description: Add a legal warning or disclaimer

faq_content.label: Store FAQ
faq_content.description: Frequently asked questions about your store

marketing.title: Marketing content
marketing.description: Customize your store's marketing content (welcome message, mission, vision, team, testimonials, certifications)
marketing.welcomePlaceholder: Welcome to our store! Discover our quality products...
marketing.welcomeHint: Message displayed at the top of your store homepage
marketing.missionPlaceholder: Our mission is to provide exceptional quality products...
marketing.visionPlaceholder: Our vision is to become the leader in our industry...
marketing.storyPlaceholder: Tell your store's story, how it was created, your challenges, your successes...
marketing.storyHint: Complete story of your store (Markdown supported)

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.description: Configure email notifications for your store
notifications.enableEmailHint: Enable or disable all email notifications
notifications.notificationEmailHint: If empty, the store contact email will be used
notifications.quietHoursHint: Disable notifications during certain hours (except critical alerts)
notifications.criticalAlertsHint: Critical alerts are always sent, even during quiet hours
notifications.toastSavedDescription: Your notification settings have been updated successfully.

commerce.alertDescription: Configure shipping zones and taxes for your store. These settings will be used when calculating shipping fees and taxes on orders.
commerce.shippingZonesDescription: Create geographic zones to define where you ship your products
commerce.shippingRatesDescription: Configure shipping rates for each zone
commerce.taxConfigurationsDescription: Configure tax rates by country and region
commerce.taxDialogDescription: Configure tax settings for a specific country or region
commerce.taxInclusiveHint: If enabled, the displayed price already includes tax
commerce.taxAppliesShippingHint: If enabled, tax also applies to shipping fees
commerce.taxActivateHint: Inactive configurations will not be applied
commerce.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this tax configuration? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Store settings
settings.description: Manage all details of your online store
settings.configImportedDescription: Configuration has been imported. Review changes before saving.
settings.aboutHint: This text will appear in the "About" tab of your store

details.cancelDialogDescription: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel them? All your changes will be lost.

toast.validationErrorsDescription: Please fix the errors before continuing.
toast.linkCopiedDescription: Your store link has been copied to the clipboard.

settings.title: Store settings
settings.description: Manage all details of your online store

location.title: Location and hours
location.description: Configure your store address and opening hours

seo.title: SEO configuration
seo.description: Optimize your store's search engine ranking

analytics.title: Store analytics
analytics.description: Track your store performance with detailed statistics
analytics.trackingDescription: Configure your tracking and analytics tools

url.linkDescription: Share this link so customers can access your store
url.customDomainDescription: Connect your own domain to your store
